name: History - Scans show correct source label (CLI or GitHub Action)
description: After mock login, navigate to /history. Verify that each scan row in the history list shows a source label such as 'CLI', 'GitHub Action', or 'Manual Scan' that correctly identifies where the scan originated. The label must not be blank for any scan row.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /api/mock-login?secret=mantiz_e2e_bypass_2026 to authenticate the session
Verify the history list shows at least one scan row
Verify each visible scan row in the history list displays a source label (such as 'CLI', 'GitHub Action', or an icon indicating origin) and the label is not empty or missing
